overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character running through a misty marshland and into a dense forest. The environment features tall grass, dead trees, wooden defensive stakes in the water, and transitions from open wetlands to shaded woodland trails.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty marsh wetland with wooden defensive stakes

agents.ego_description: samurai character running steadily along the dirt path through open marshlands with sword visible on back

entered.detail: shallow wetland water with mist hovering above the surface
defensive wooden stakes protruding from the water in the distance
leafless dead trees standing in the marsh water
narrow dirt trail winding through tall grass
tall green and brown grass flanking the path
tall evergreen pine trees forming the forest edge
hazy mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide marsh wetland with a samurai character running along a dirt path. Wooden defensive stakes protrude from the misty water on the right, while dead trees stand silhouetted against the overcast sky. Tall grass flanks the trail and pine trees line the left horizon.

events.description: large moss-covered boulder enters view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the winding path as the tree cover increases and the marsh recedes

entered.detail: moss-covered boulder sitting beside the path at the forest edge

segments.scene_description: The character runs past the open marsh into a transitional forest edge zone. A large mossy boulder appears on the right while the wooden stakes fade into the distance. The pine trees on the left grow closer and denser, partially obscuring the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest with fallen timber

events.description: path becomes noticeably darker as denser tree canopy blocks overhead light

agents.ego_description: running through the shaded forest section, navigating past fallen logs on the left

entered.detail: large fallen tree trunks and timber lying beside the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a denser forest area where the path becomes darker and more enclosed. Fallen logs appear on the left side of the trail while the marsh water and rock formation exit the frame. The character continues running through the shaded woodland as the trees close in around the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a samurai runs from an open, misty marshland into the depths of a shaded forest. It begins on a wide wetland trail where wooden defensive stakes protrude from the water and dead trees stand silhouetted against an overcast sky. As the character moves forward, the open marsh gives way to a transitional forest edge, where a large mossy boulder appears on the right and the pine trees on the left grow denser. The scene then shifts into a more enclosed woodland area, with the marsh water and rock formations exiting the frame as fallen logs appear along the path. Finally, the environment becomes darker and more confined as the trees close in around the character, completing the transition from the open wetlands to the deep forest.
